# FFmpeg colour-enum code points — vendored for `cargo xtask check`.
# Source: FFmpeg n8.1 libavutil/pixfmt.h
# Fetched: 2026-05-19
#
# Regenerate via `cargo xtask sync` after bumping the FFMPEG_TAG constant.
# One `<ENUM> <FFMPEG_NAME> <VALUE>` per line; AVColor*/AVChroma* enums,
# C-counter rules. *_NB sentinels, the post-NB custom EXT extensions,
# and the RESERVED*-prefix stripped names are kept verbatim; aliases
# collapse to the first name seen for each distinct value.

ColorPrimaries RESERVED0 0
ColorPrimaries BT709 1
ColorPrimaries UNSPECIFIED 2
ColorPrimaries RESERVED 3
ColorPrimaries BT470M 4
ColorPrimaries BT470BG 5
ColorPrimaries SMPTE170M 6
ColorPrimaries SMPTE240M 7
ColorPrimaries FILM 8
ColorPrimaries BT2020 9
ColorPrimaries SMPTE428 10
ColorPrimaries SMPTE431 11
ColorPrimaries SMPTE432 12
ColorPrimaries EBU3213 22
ColorTransfer RESERVED0 0
ColorTransfer BT709 1
ColorTransfer UNSPECIFIED 2
ColorTransfer RESERVED 3
ColorTransfer GAMMA22 4
ColorTransfer GAMMA28 5
ColorTransfer SMPTE170M 6
ColorTransfer SMPTE240M 7
ColorTransfer LINEAR 8
ColorTransfer LOG 9
ColorTransfer LOG_SQRT 10
ColorTransfer IEC61966_2_4 11
ColorTransfer BT1361_ECG 12
ColorTransfer IEC61966_2_1 13
ColorTransfer BT2020_10 14
ColorTransfer BT2020_12 15
ColorTransfer SMPTE2084 16
ColorTransfer SMPTE428 17
ColorTransfer ARIB_STD_B67 18
ColorMatrix RGB 0
ColorMatrix BT709 1
ColorMatrix UNSPECIFIED 2
ColorMatrix RESERVED 3
ColorMatrix FCC 4
ColorMatrix BT470BG 5
ColorMatrix SMPTE170M 6
ColorMatrix SMPTE240M 7
ColorMatrix YCGCO 8
ColorMatrix BT2020_NCL 9
ColorMatrix BT2020_CL 10
ColorMatrix SMPTE2085 11
ColorMatrix CHROMA_DERIVED_NCL 12
ColorMatrix CHROMA_DERIVED_CL 13
ColorMatrix ICTCP 14
ColorMatrix IPT_C2 15
ColorMatrix YCGCO_RE 16
ColorMatrix YCGCO_RO 17
ColorRange UNSPECIFIED 0
ColorRange MPEG 1
ColorRange JPEG 2
ChromaLocation UNSPECIFIED 0
ChromaLocation LEFT 1
ChromaLocation CENTER 2
ChromaLocation TOPLEFT 3
ChromaLocation TOP 4
ChromaLocation BOTTOMLEFT 5
ChromaLocation BOTTOM 6
